programmes.show_description: A Deadly Obsession. Alice Ruggles meets soldier Trimaan Dhillon on Facebook. Experts analyse Dhillon's terrifying behaviour after Alice is found dead. S6, Ep2
The Bermondsey Horror. A body is found under a kitchen floor, and the homeowners are on the run. After their arrest they have different stories about how the victim died. S1, Ep4
The Lambeth Serial Killer. Two young women are poisoned by a mysterious man called Fred. Can the police track down this man in time to stop him killing again? S1, Ep5
The Dog Knows. When 37-year-old Merrilee Cox-Lafferty disappears in Utah, police turn to CCTV to track her down. Then her car turns up 300 miles away in Idaho. S10, Ep9
She's Fake. In Fernandina Beach, Florida, cosmetologist Joleen Cummings goes missing after an appointment. CCTV footage reveals an unlikely suspect. S10, Ep10

Material Witness. A victim's estranged spouse is often a key witness in a murder investigation, and when the body is found, family and friends can provide crucial information. S7, Ep89
Betrayed. Sometimes, when a death seems to be accidental, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal hidden betrayals that reclassify cases from accidents to homicides. S7, Ep90
Hidden Agenda. The FBI is hot on the trail of bank robbers who leave behind bombs after their crime, but there's more to their cause than meets the eye. S4, Ep2
Vanished. When the wife of a wealthy man vanished, an unusual ransom note provided clues to the captor - who turned out to be involved in one of his companies. S4, Ep5
Joanna Yeates. British criminal barrister Robert Rinder examines the case of 25-year-old Joanna Yeates, who was found strangled to death on Christmas Day in 2010. S1, Ep3
Murder Is No Accident. A vivacious 33-year-old drowns in the middle of a crowded lake. The investigation untangles a dark, nefarious past that includes theft and multiple murders. S2, Ep2
A Fateful Meeting. When Amy disappears, police have a suspect but no crime scene, no body and no evidence. It takes an unexpected informant to blow the case wide open. S1, Ep11
The Vanishing Babysitter. 15-year-old Elizabeth Ennen was last seen when a friend dropped her home, but police find a piece of CCTV that turns the case in an unexpected direction. S2, Ep10
Mark Fellows. In summer 2014, a drink thrown in a Manchester nightclub triggered a gangland feud that caused years of ruthless violence, with deadly consequences. S1, Ep7
A Mother's Work. When Lanny Horwitz is found murdered in his own home, it unleashes a shocking tale of jealousy and infidelity, leaving every member of the family a suspect. S3, Ep5
Into The Swamp. When Terry Thrift vanishes, no one has answers. The mystery of his disappearance - and the salacious betrayal behind it - isn't solved for 20 years. S3, Ep8
Smokescreen. Detectives in Waynesfield, Ohio, discover the body of Erin Mulcahy in her shower. Can the police catch those responsible for the town's first murder in 50 years? S4, Ep20
320k Con And Zoe Dronfield. Judge Rinder examines the real-life case of Debbie Davey, who fell victim to an elaborate scam orchestrated by a very close friend. S1, Ep4
The Vanishing Babysitter. 15-year-old Elizabeth Ennen was last seen when a friend dropped her home, but police find a piece of CCTV that turns the case in an unexpected direction. S2, Ep10
Grenada: The Body In The Suitcase. In 2009, young mother Nixiann Downes-Clack went missing from her island home in Grenada. Her family speak about the desperate search to find her. S1, Ep7
Joshua Davies. 16-year-old Joshua Davies was sentenced to 14 years in jail for the murder of his on-off girlfriend. Why did he kill - and only confess to it in prison? S1, Ep5
Mansion Murder Cam. In Florida, two loving parents are brutally gunned down. The police must rely on surveillance cameras to catch the killers and bring them to justice. S1, Ep1
Mind Hunters. A vicious serial killer drinks the blood of his victims. FBI agent Robert Ressler builds a psychological profile to help catch this murderer. S1, Ep4
Dead Men Do Talk. In Florida, a killer admits murder but no one can find his victim; and in Virginia, police have a decomposed body, but no suspect. Can forensics crack these cases? S1, Ep3
Not In Life, Not In Sleep. After Cristina goes missing, a man spotted on CCTV may hold the answers to the Minnesota woman's mysterious disappearance. S10, Ep11
Remember Me? After the shooting of a military veteran in his own home, detectives hunt a trail of CCTV across Kansas City to find his elusive killers. S10, Ep12

Elements Of Murder. Everyday substances can reveal hidden clues that break a homicide case. One case is disproved when cyanide is found in a woman's blood stream. S7, Ep91
Random Targets. Most victims of multiple murderers have a link with the killer or match their set of criteria. But some murders occur when victims appear to be picked at random. S7, Ep92
The Great Philby Mob War. Three armed men attack a man and flee the scene. Authorities are unable to identify the assailants but are convinced it was the work of the Mafia. S7, Ep3
Death in the Delta. Shannon Sanderson was abducted after a successful night at the casino and police discovered she had been stalked and attacked for her $5,000 winnings. S4, Ep9
320k Con And Zoe Dronfield. Judge Rinder examines the real-life case of Debbie Davey, who fell victim to an elaborate scam orchestrated by a very close friend. S1, Ep4
Someone's Lying. In 2015, a hunter comes across a woman in the woods who has been murdered. Detectives unravel a web of dark secrets and lies that lead to a twisted killer. S2, Ep5
Dark Waters. A basketball star and his girlfriend disappear while sailing. Can investigators track down his brother, who's the only person who may know what happened? S1, Ep12
One Chance, One Look. In Tempe, Arizona, millionaire entrepreneur Rick Chance is brutally gunned down in a hotel room. To catch the killer, detectives turn to surveillance video. S2, Ep11
Lewis Daynes. Breck Bedner was a 14-year-old boy who was groomed online and then murdered by 18-year-old Lewis Daynes. What caused this teenager to kill an innocent adolescent? S1, Ep10
Don't Forget Me. When a father-of-two suddenly vanishes, his friends hint that he led a secret life. But it remains a mystery for years - until a tip reveals the jaw-dropping truth. S3, Ep9
In Sickness And In Health. When outgoing Beth Spaulding and shy Jason Risenburg meet, it seems a perfect match. But a series of disasters rip apart this once-perfect couple. S4, Ep3
Blue Nightmare. The murder of a popular EMT devastates the local police in Columbus, Georgia. The ensuing investigation tests the public's faith in law enforcement itself. S4, Ep13
Adam Vincent And Sophie Lancaster. British criminal barrister Robert Rinder examines the case of Adam Vincent from Grimsby, who was severely menaced by a local family. S1, Ep5
One Chance, One Look. In Tempe, Arizona, millionaire entrepreneur Rick Chance is brutally gunned down in a hotel room. To catch the killer, detectives turn to surveillance video. S2, Ep11
We Sell Babies. Detroit FBI begins uncovering a heartbreaking nationwide adoption scam, with the con artist praying on hundreds of hopeful families. S2, Ep4
Motor Mayhem. A parking lot showdown terrifies onlookers. A fender-bender leads a motorist on an epic chase. An aggressive driver uses an unusual weapon on her victim. S1, Ep1
Chaotic Confrontations. An off-duty police officer pulls a gun on another motorist. A machete-wielding man attacks a delivery driver, and an SUV nearly runs down a cyclist. S1, Ep2
